Description: The MudXChat component is used to house one or more MudChatBubble components, with optional components such as MudAvatar, MudChatHeader, and MudChatFooter.

Parameters.Name: ArrowPosition
Parameters.Description:
The Chat Bubble Arrow Position.
Remarks: Defaults to Top

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description:
The CSS classes applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. You can use spaces to separate multiple classes. Use the property to apply custom CSS styles.

Parameters.Name: Color
Parameters.Description: Child chat bubbles default color, can be overridden by bubble.

Parameters.Name: Dense
Parameters.Description:
Gets or sets whether compact padding will be used.
Remarks: Defaults to false.

Parameters.Name: Elevation
Parameters.Description:
Size of the drop shadow.
Remarks: Defaults to 0. A higher number creates a heavier drop shadow. Use a value of 0 for no shadow.

Parameters.Name: Square
Parameters.Description:
Gets or sets whether rounded corners are disabled.
Remarks: Defaults to false.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description:
The CSS styles applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. Use the property to apply CSS classes.

Parameters.Name: Tag
Parameters.Description:
The arbitrary object to link to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to associate additional information with this component, such as a model containing data for this component.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description:
The additional HTML attributes to apply to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to provide additional HTML attributes during rendering such as ARIA accessibility tags or a custom ID.

Parameters.Name: Variant
Parameters.Description:
Display variant to use.
Remarks: Defaults to . The variant changes the appearance of the chat bubbles, such as Text, Outlined, or Filled.

PublicProperties.Name: RightToLeft
PublicProperties.Description: Whether or not to use Right To Left
